impact: This adds a deterministic syntax-failure circuit breaker for the daemon: after repeated SyntaxError, py_compile, or TypeScript parse failures, the next worker prompt is forced toward one small parser-clean proposal, source-file preflight before broad validation, reuse of existing committed contracts, and no PP&D domain implementation during supervisor repair.
summary: Tighten PP&D supervisor repair guidance for repeated parser and compile rollbacks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
